irregularities.label: WIDE_FORMAT
irregularities.evidence: Columns 1 to 9 all represent different values of a single variable (ethnic population counts for various years).
irregularities.details: The column headers are not variable names but rather dimension values corresponding to years.

irregularities.label: SPARSE_ROW_FILL
irregularities.evidence: Rows contain ethnic population counts that are filled only for the first row of each block, followed by blanks.
irregularities.details: Each ethnic group has its population values only presented once at the start of the corresponding year column without repeats for blocks.
